prompt_text: Guide the participant through progressive whole-body rest in supine relaxation, releasing each region slowly and ending with quiet breath awareness.
notes: Starter prompt for home-practice support when no recorded audio is attached yet.

prompt_text: Use a brief guided rest with breath awareness and rapid release of body tension before the next practice block.
notes: Starter home-practice prompt for quick relaxation transitions.

prompt_text: Guide a short instant relaxation by inhaling, tightening the body lightly, then exhaling and releasing fully into stillness.
notes: Useful as a short home-practice prompt or in chair-based support sequences.

prompt_text: Lead steady Om chanting with brief silences between repetitions, then allow quiet observation of the settling effect in the body and mind.
notes: Starter script until curated recorded audio is attached.

prompt_text: Guide the participant through alternating stimulation and relaxation with slow transitions and awareness of the changing body-mind response.
notes: Starter cyclic meditation prompt for home-practice preparation.

prompt_text: Lead A-kara, U-kara, M-kara, and A-U-M chanting slowly with resonance awareness in the body and a calm silent pause after each round.
notes: Matches the curriculum emphasis on guided chanting and resonance awareness.

prompt_text: Guide soft humming exhalations with relaxed face, throat, and shoulders, inviting the participant to feel the vibration settle the mind.
notes: Starter prompt for guided home practice or follow-up support.

prompt_text: Use the chair-supported sequence: chair-supported IRT, neck relaxation, chair Sasankasana movement, chair rest, chair Ardha Chakrasana and Padahastasana, then QRT with easy diaphragmatic breathing.
notes: Starter protocol-level prompt based on the Yoga Chair Breathing procedure in the therapy training text.
